name: PT Dua Putra Utama Makmur Tbk
summary: PT Dua Putra Utama Makmur Tbk engages in the fisheries and trading businesses in Indonesia. Its fish products include Indian mackerel, black pomfret, narrow-barred Spanish mackerel, large-head hairtail, snapper, spotted sardine, moonfish, round scad, short-fin scad, bullet tuna, frigate tuna, skipjack tuna, trevally, barracuda, thread-fin bream, hard-tail scad, leather jacket, tuna, purple-spotted big eye, grouper, conger eel, emperor, parrotfish, lizardfish, banyar fish, hammer croaker, samge, swangi, bloso, lemadang, silago, grouper, pure-bred, deho, salem, splotch, salmon, trevally, badong, tuna, manyung, kuniran, milkfish, jahan, etc. The company also provides shrimp products comprising white, black tiger, sea tiger, pink, flower, and vannamei shrimps; and squids, cuttlefish, and octopus. In addition, it offers processed food, including marugoto, ebi furay, ebi fritter, katsu ball squid and shrimp, nugget shrimp, squid nugget and beef, and shrimp steak and meatballs. The company was founded in 2012 and is headquartered in Pati, Indonesia. PT Dua Putra Utama Makmur Tbk is a subsidiary of PT Pandawa Putra Investama.
